name: SKIN1004 UV Defense Sunscreen
pros: Excellent value at ¥2,700 with strong 4.56★ rating despite smaller review base
Marketed for sensitive skin, making it safer for those with reactions to Japanese sunscreens
K-beauty formulation appeals to expats familiar with Korean skincare quality standards
cons: Only 57 reviews means less real-world data than competitors; harder to predict individual results
Limited brand recognition in Japan outside K-beauty circles; harder to repurchase or get advice locally
shortDescription: Korean sunscreen for sensitive skin at an attractive ¥2,700 price point with solid early reviews.
review: SKIN1004 offers solid value for budget-conscious expats seeking a gentle, non-irritating sunscreen. The K-beauty formulation is lighter than many Japanese options, which some prefer. The caveat: with only 57 reviews, you're taking a calculated risk. If sensitive skin is your priority and you're willing to experiment, this is worth trying; otherwise, stick with higher-volume options.
